properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: There is power In the name of Jesus! :/ 3x

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: To break every chain, Break every chain, Break every chain. :/

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: To break every chain, Break every chain, Break every chain. :/

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There is power In the name of Jesus! To break every chain, Break every chain, Break every chain.
